title: A 'millennial genius' China's internet can't get enough of: Moonshot AI's founder
excerpt: Users on Weibo are calling Yang Zhilin a "millennial genius," upsetting US tech stocks with Moonshot AI's latest Kimi K3 model.
content_html:
The founder of China's hottest AI startup du jour is having a main character moment.

Yang Zhilin, the 34-year-old founder and CEO of Moonshot AI, is going viral on the Chinese social media platform Weibo. Chinese fans of the executive are calling him a "millennial genius" after his new Kimi K3 model made waves in the global AI landscape.

The hashtag "Post-90s Tsinghua University genius crashed US stocks" was the third-most-popular tag in Weibo's tech hot searches as of 10 a.m. local time Wednesday. In China, the term "Post-90s" refers to people born between 1990 and 1999.

The tag had been viewed 32 million times in 24 hours when Business Insider viewed it at 10 a.m. local time.

"We once chased after Silicon Valley's AI, but now a post-90s Tsinghua entrepreneur has unveiled a cutting-edge open-source model, directly shaking Wall Street," a Weibo user from Beijing posted under the tag on Tuesday.

A user from China's eastern Zhejiang province called Yang a "top student from Tsinghua University," and said his "superior technology directly shook Silicon Valley's AI monopoly."

Tsinghua University is a leading public university in Beijing. In the 2026 QS World University Rankings for Data Science and Artificial Intelligence, Tsinghua ranked among the top 10 colleges globally.

There's also a group of Weibo users who are fans of Yang's youthful appearance, calling him "baby face."

Another Weibo user from Zhejiang struck a more nihilistic tone, echoing China's "lie flat" movement: "I'm increasingly convinced that the future truly belongs to these geniuses and has little to do with ordinary people like us."

Yang's Weibo virality comes shortly after Moonshot AI launched its latest AI model, Kimi K3, on Friday, promising to rival the capabilities of Anthropic and OpenAI models in coding, reasoning, and knowledge-based tasks. The company said it would release the model weight on July 27, allowing developers to fine-tune and build on top of it.

The model's release was followed by a sell-off of big US tech stocks like Google and Nvidia, reminiscent of the shake-up caused by China's DeepSeek AI startup last year.

Moonshot AI said in a Sunday X post that the model's launch drew so many new subscribers that it had to temporarily pause subscriptions to reduce the load on its limited compute resources.

Industry executives have taken note of the Kimi K3's capabilities. Cloud platform Vercel's CEO, Guillermo Rauch, said in a Friday X post, "This is the first time that an open model is ahead of all proprietary ones for this comprehensive web engineering benchmark."

SpaceX CEO Elon Musk said in a Saturday X post that Grok's coming model "might be able to exceed Kimi," thanks to its two-trillion-parameter training, to which Kimi responded on Weibo, "Welcome to the 2 Trillion+ Club."

Aditi Bharade

content_html_zh:
中国最热门的人工智能初创公司的创始人正在迎来主角时刻。

34 岁的 Moonshot AI 创始人兼首席执行官杨志林在中国社交媒体平台微博上走红。 在他的新款 Kimi K3 模型在全球人工智能领域引起轰动后，这位高管的中国粉丝称他为“千禧一代天才”。

截至上午10点，“90后清华天才崩盘美股”是微博科技热搜第三热门标签。 当地时间周三。 在中国，“90后”指的是1990年至1999年出生的人。

当《商业内幕》上午 10 点查看时，该标签在 24 小时内被浏览了 3200 万次。 当地时间。

“曾经我们追逐硅谷的人工智能，现在一位90后清华企业家却推出了最前沿的开源模式，直接震动了华尔街，”一位来自北京的微博用户周二在该标签下发帖称。

一位来自中国东部浙江省的用户称杨为“清华大学高材生”，并表示他的“卓越技术直接动摇了硅谷的人工智能垄断”。

清华大学是北京一所领先的公立大学。 在2026年QS世界大学数据科学与人工智能专业排名中，清华大学位列全球前10名。

还有一群微博用户喜欢杨洋年轻的外表，称他为“娃娃脸”。

另一位来自浙江的微博用户则用了更为虚无主义的语气，呼应了中国的“平躺”运动：“我越来越相信，未来真正属于这些天才，与我们这样的普通人无关。”

上周五，Moonshot AI 推出了最新的人工智能模型 Kimi K3，并承诺在编码、推理和基于知识的任务方面与 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 模型的能力相媲美。杨的微博迅速走红。 该公司表示将于 7 月 27 日发布模型权重，允许开发人员在其基础上进行微调和构建。

该模型发布后，谷歌和英伟达等美国大型科技股遭到抛售，这让人想起去年中国人工智能初创公司 DeepSeek 引发的震荡。

Moonshot AI 在 Sunday X 的一篇帖子中表示，该模型的推出吸引了如此多的新订阅者，以至于它不得不暂时暂停订阅，以减少其有限计算资源的负载。

行业高管已经注意到 Kimi K3 的功能。 云平台 Vercel 的首席执行官 Guillermo Rauch 在周五的一篇帖子中表示，“对于这个全面的网络工程基准测试，开放模型首次领先于所有专有模型。”

SpaceX 首席执行官埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在周六的 X 帖子中表示，Grok 的即将推出的模型“可能能够超越 Kimi”，这要归功于其 2 万亿参数训练，Kimi 在微博上回应道，“欢迎来到 2 万亿+俱乐部”。
